rationale: Fresh validator started from implementation build, planning build, roadmap task, specs, and touched code/tests. Acceptance verified: source-owned audit engine and shared API exist, codewiki_audit and /audit wrap that engine, required flags parse, machine-readable audit reports include fingerprints, smoke tests cover default full plus three scoped profiles, and requested checks pass. Changed audit has one generated-state warning for .codewiki/index_graph.json in dirty pre-commit state; not blocking implementation validation or commit-readiness, but must be handled before publication/task-close as policy requires.
checks: node executeCodewikiAudit assertion: default full pass with 17 fingerprints; scoped file-structure/security/package reports pass with sha256 fingerprints
node parseAuditCommandInput assertion: file-structure/security/alignment/package/changed/task/layer/path/json flags parse as expected
codewiki_audit full: pass (alignment, file-structure, stale-reference, package, security, generated-parity)
codewiki_audit alignment+changed+task: warning only for generated .codewiki/index_graph.json changed in dirty pre-commit tree

issues.summary: audit:changed reported generated-file-changed for .codewiki/index_graph.json; acceptable for implementation pre-commit validation but blocks clean publication/task-close until refreshed or reconciled.

audit_reports: codewiki_audit full include_fingerprints=true: pass; profiles alignment,file-structure,stale-reference,package,security,generated-parity; issues=0.
codewiki_audit profiles alignment,changed task_id=TASK-079 include_fingerprints=true: warning; alignment pass, changed warning generated-file-changed .codewiki/index_graph.json, task pass.

executeCodewikiAudit direct assertion: kind=audit_report, machine-readable profiles/checked_scopes/issues/evidence_refs/fingerprints present; full fingerprints=17; scoped file-structure/security/package sha256 fingerprints present.

isolation_requirement.reason: Implementation validation requires independent validator context and checked content proof.

audit_requirement.reason: Gateway profiles require deterministic audit evidence for their build or boundary context.
